title: Infosys incorporates step-down wholly-owned subsidiary Infosys BPM Canada Inc.
detailed_summary: Infosys Limited incorporated a step-down wholly-owned subsidiary, Infosys BPM Canada Inc., in Canada on July 28, 2025. The entity has share capital of CAD 10, no applicable turnover, and belongs to the Information Technology and Information Technology enabled Services industry. Its shareholding is held 100% by Infosys BPM UK Limited.

key_facts.fact: Infosys BPM Canada Inc. was incorporated in Canada with share capital of CAD 10.
Infosys BPM Canada Inc. belongs to the Information Technology and Information Technology enabled Services industry.
100% of the shareholding is held by Infosys BPM UK Limited, a step-down wholly-owned subsidiary of Infosys Limited.

corporate_actions.description: Infosys incorporated Infosys BPM Canada Inc. as a step-down wholly-owned subsidiary in Canada.

important_text_spans.text: the Company has incorporated a step-down wholly-owned subsidiary in the name and style of Infosys BPM Canada Inc.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main event of subsidiary incorporation.

important_text_spans.text: 100% of the shareholding is held by Infosys BPM UK Limited, a step-down wholly-owned subsidiary of Infosys Limited.

processing_notes: Marked non-material because the document reports a routine subsidiary incorporation with nominal share capital and no stated financial or strategic impact.
